message: ci: pass token to planning dashboard status

files.patch:
@@ -138,6 +138,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Publish planning status
         if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch' || github.event.inputs.apply_existing != 'true' }}
         working-directory: clawsweeper
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.OPENCLAW_GH_TOKEN || github.token }}
         run: |
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
